use flate2::write::GzEncoder;
use flate2::Compression;
use std::io::Write;

// BAD: gzip encoder created for each tiny payload
fn compress_response(body: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut encoder = GzEncoder::new(Vec::new(), Compression::default());
    encoder.write_all(body).unwrap();
    encoder.finish().unwrap()
}

fn handle_request(request: &Request) -> Response {
    let body = format!("{{\"status\": \"ok\", \"id\": {}}}", request.id);
    // 30-byte payload compressed with gzip overhead
    let compressed = compress_response(body.as_bytes());
    Response::with_body(compressed)
}
